chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3028 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 13575/2024 2. For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah Advocate for the Petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel the petition has served its purpose, therefore, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
